skip: Skip — I'll set it up myself

welcome.title: Welcome to ProfiBrew!
welcome.subtitle: This wizard will help you set up your brewery

brewery.title: Your Brewery
brewery.info: This information will appear on documents and exports.

warehouses.title: Warehouses
warehouses.subtitle: Verify the pre-created warehouses and choose the beer stocking method.
warehouses.stockModePackagesDesc: Precise tracking of kegs, bottles, and KEGs.

economics.title: Economic Parameters
economics.subtitle: Set default values for cost calculation.
economics.overheadPercentageDesc: X% will be added to raw material costs to cover losses and indirect costs.
economics.overheadFixedDesc: Fixed costs per batch (energy, water, labor).
economics.generateExpenseDesc: Automatically record an expense in cash flow when stocking raw materials.

excise.title: Excise Duty
excise.info: Breweries with annual production over 200,000 liters are excise duty payers. Small independent breweries under 200,000 l/year have a reduced rate or exemption.

reminder.message: You skipped the setup wizard. Would you like to go back to it?
